message:
feat(diagnostic): add typed decision_context redaction to audit reports

The diagnostic bundle's audit redaction was not handling the new
decision_context field that stores structured policy evaluation details.
This adds:

- decision_context field to RedactedAudit struct, stored as parsed
  serde_json::Value instead of raw string for cleaner JSON output
- redact_json_value(): recursive redaction that walks JSON trees and
  applies the Redactor to all string values, preserving structure
  (object keys, arrays, numbers, booleans) while scrubbing secrets
- redact_decision_context(): parses the raw decision_context string
  as JSON, applies recursive redaction, and falls back to treating
  the whole string as a single redactable value if parsing fails
- Delegates field-level redaction to AuditActionRecord::redact_fields()
  for input_summary and decision_reason, keeping redaction logic
  co-located with the data type
- Updated all test fixtures to use typed DecisionContext with evidence
  entries containing synthetic API keys, verifying that secrets in
  nested evidence arrays are properly redacted while structural fields
  (surface, action, actor) are preserved

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
